lineage.Process: CalculateField "ANP de administración nacional definitivas" anp_docreg "Informe N° 790-2019-SERNANP-DDE" VB #
CalculateField "ANP de administración nacional definitivas" anp_obs "Precisión de la base gráfica de la RN del Titicaca" VB #
AlterField D://Conexion_lvaler.sde/gdb.sde.ÁreasNaturalesProtegidasEstablecidas/gdb.sde.ANPAdministracionNacionalDefinitivas anp_obs g_obs "Observaciones técnicas" TEXT 255 NULLABLE false

FeatureClassToFeatureClass E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp E:\sernanp\data\DB_TELEDETECCION.gdb\fd_base gpo_anp # "objectid "objectid" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,objectid,-1,-1;anp_cate "anp_cate" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_cate,-1,-1;anp_codi "anp_codi" true true false 10 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_codi,-1,-1;anp_nomb "anp_nomb" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_nomb,-1,-1;anp_sect "anp_sect" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_sect,-1,-1;anp_ubpo "anp_ubpo" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_ubpo,-1,-1;anp_suleg "anp_suleg" true true false 17 Double 6 16 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_suleg,-1,-1;anp_uicn "anp_uicn" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_uicn,-1,-1;anp_balec "anp_balec" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_balec,-1,-1;anp_felec "anp_felec" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_felec,-1,-1;anp_balem "anp_balem" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_balem,-1,-1;anp_felem "anp_felem" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_felem,-1,-1;g_obs "g_obs" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,g_obs,-1,-1;anp_docreg "anp_docreg" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_docreg,-1,-1;anp_fecreg "anp_fecreg" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,anp_fecreg,-1,-1;created_us "created_us" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,created_us,-1,-1;created_da "created_da" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,created_da,-1,-1;last_edite "last_edite" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,last_edite,-1,-1;last_edi_1 "last_edi_1" true true false 8 Date 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,last_edi_1,-1,-1;ruleid "ruleid" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,ruleid,-1,-1;st_area_sh "st_area_sh" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,st_area_sh,-1,-1;st_length_ "st_length_" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,E:\sernanp\data\gpo_anp.shp,st_length_,-1,-1" #
CalculateField gpo_anp_monit anp_cate "Area de Conservacion Regional" VB #

ExportFeatures gpo_anp_monit "C:\Users\SUPER ULTRA HP\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\BaseMap_LandSat\BaseMap_LandSat.gdb\ACR_Cusco" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "anp_cate "anp_cate" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,gpo_anp_monit,anp_cate,0,49;anp_codi "anp_codi" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,gpo_anp_monit,anp_codi,0,9;anp_nomb "anp_nomb" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,gpo_anp_monit,anp_nomb,0,253;area_m2 "area_m2" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,gpo_anp_monit,area_m2,-1,-1;anp_clase "anp_clase" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,gpo_anp_monit,anp_clase,0,19;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,gpo_anp_monit,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,gpo_anp_monit,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures ACR_Cusco "D:\GFP GORE CUSCO\BASE DE DATOS MONITOREO REMOTO\Áreas de Conservación Regional\ACR_Cusco.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "anp_cate "anp_cate" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,ACR_Cusco,anp_cate,0,49;anp_codi "anp_codi" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,ACR_Cusco,anp_codi,0,9;anp_nomb "anp_nomb" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,ACR_Cusco,anp_nomb,0,253;area_m2 "area_m2" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,ACR_Cusco,area_m2,-1,-1;anp_clase "anp_clase" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,ACR_Cusco,anp_clase,0,19;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,ACR_Cusco,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,ACR_Cusco,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #
Buffer ACR_Cusco "C:\Users\SUPER ULTRA HP\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\ACR_Cusco_Buffer" "5 Kilometers" FULL ROUND NONE # PLANAR
Erase ACR_Cusco_Buffer "Area de Conservación Regional" "C:\Users\SUPER ULTRA HP\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\ACR_Cusco_Buffer_Erase1" #

Rename "C:\Users\Favio Campos Rivera\Desktop\GFP-Subnacional\2025\LINEA BASE SHP\ZI_ACR.shp" "C:\Users\Favio Campos Rivera\Desktop\GFP-Subnacional\2025\LINEA BASE SHP\Choqueiquirao_ZI_ACR.shp" ShapeFile

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
